nasb.text: Did the Lord rage against the rivers, Or was Your anger against the rivers, Or was Your wrath against the sea, That You rode on Your horses, On Your chariots of salvation?

esv.text: Was your wrath against the rivers, O Lord? Was your anger against the rivers, or your indignation against the sea, when you rode on your horses, on your chariot of salvation?

cnv.text: 耶和華啊！你騎上你的馬，乘駕得勝的戰車， 難道是惱怒江河、向江河發怒、向海洋洩憤？

ccb.text: 耶和华啊，你是向江河发怒吗？ 你乘着得胜的战车而来， 是向江河生气吗？ 是向海洋发怒吗？
